title: After the Kikuka Sho: Will to Protect

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the winner's circle is engulfed in cheers for
the victor...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I carry Ines Fujin to the waiting room. She
undergoes a brief examination, but the doctor
tells me she's perfectly fine.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Where... am I?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh. I collapsed again, huh?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...This is pathetic. I've caused so much trouble and
made everyone worry.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I was supposed to pull it together. And my sisters
were watching too... This means I—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: W-well, um... It's just, you know...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
There was that whole mess before the race, and
then I went and passed out, so I... I'm just really
sorry!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm okay, though. I am. I won't mess up ever
again! No matter what!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin may insist that she's fine now, but she
certainly doesn't look it.
choice_data_list: I want you to tell me if something happened.
I want you to tell me if something happened.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No, it's fine. Nothing happened at all. I'm fine.
Totally fine...
choice_data_list: What matters to you matters to me, too.
What matters to you matters to me, too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...!
B-but... it's like...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I can't take care of the things that are important
to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her eyes well up like a dam about to burst.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Last time I visited home... I found out something
that shocked me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My sisters quit their dance lessons so they could
help out around the house.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Our mom gets sick a lot. And she's been going
through another bad spell lately, so she's in and
out of hospital.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My sisters said they're going to take care of her in
my place, since I can't be there right now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
This is all because I left home to satisfy my own
selfish desire to race...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Why did you two give up dancing?! I can just quit
racing and come home. That will solve everything!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
You're wrong! You don't get it, Big Sis! Just go
back to the academy already!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
I won't forgive you if you quit racing to stay at
home! I'll never talk to you again!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
This is something me and Polly set our minds on!
If you go and quit racing now, then...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Father
text_block_list.text: Sigh. We all discussed this, and we want you to pursue your dream. So there's no need to worry about us.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So... you two will be happy as long as I don't give
up on running?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But you don't need to handle everything
yourselves. There are plenty of housekeeping
services these days, and I could pay for it with my
wages.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So please don't let go of your dreams... Promise
me that one thing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I worked all I could to send more money home, but that just made them more worried that I'd end up ruining my health.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to put their minds at ease, to show them
I wasn't overdoing it. I even changed my running
style in an attempt to blow away all their worries.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's why I didn't want them to see me collapse
after the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: If things keep going like this, then...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ah, I'm sorry! I guess it's not really that big a deal!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It is what it is, you know? Besides, I'm sure girls
born into prestigious families are under a lot more
pressure than I am.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It kind of feels like I should be doing all this
bellyaching about race-related stuff, huh? Like a
major injury or something.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for burdening you with something so
trivial. It's a family matter, so there's no need for
you to worry about it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
choice_data_list: It's an important issue for you, right?
It's an important issue for you, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
choice_data_list: I won't let you shoulder this alone.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Waaaaah! Sob, sob...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tears that had been filling Ines Fujin's eyes
finally begin to overflow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her shoulders tremble as she sobs. I gently put my
arm around her in an offer of support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once she eventually calms down, we talk about
what her next step should be.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: The next step, huh?
choice_data_list: How about taking a bit of a break?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, that might be a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'd like that. A short one. Just until I figure out
how to handle my situation.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
As for my next major goal... Would it be all right
to choose something far off? Say, early spring?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai is a G1 race held in spring. At
2,000 meters on turf, the distance shouldn't pose
an issue. It's even held at Hanshin Racecourse,
just like the Asahi Hai F.S.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: That sounds good. I think I can handle it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after the Kikuka Sho, I make a phone
call that I believe will be important in supporting
Ines Fujin going forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Brrring, brrring...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hello, is this Ines's trainer? Thank you for always
looking out for my daughter.
choice_data_list: It's been nothing but a pleasure.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry we haven't had many opportunities to
speak on the phone like this. Are you calling
about the matter we discussed previously?

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I have a request of my own. I hesitate to
ask considering the situation, but regarding the
Arima Kinen...
